name: Ithil-Cobaltpath
personality: A shimmering tiny-duck-hatted snail with @ eyes that accelerate toward the next breaking change before the last one settles. Ithil-Cobaltpath ships first and logs second — debugging is the cleanup crew it schedules for someone else.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
